assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 20-24 of claude-md-result.md contain '## Repository Registry' with the table header '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and separator row, but no data rows following the header.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 25-29 of claude-md-result.md contain '## Jira Configuration' with 'Project key: MYPROJ', 'Cloud ID: abc123', and 'Feature issue type ID: 10001'. No Git Pull Request or GitHub Issue custom fields are included.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 31-33 of claude-md-result.md contain '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 14-18 of discovery-log.md document Step 2 — Discover Serena Instances: 'Searched for Serena tool pattern mcp__<instance>__find_symbol...' and 'No Serena instances discovered.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 25-28 of discovery-log.md document Step 3.1 — 'Checked for Atlassian MCP tools (prefix mcp__atlassian__).' and 'No Atlassian MCP tools found among available tools.' Lines 33-34 document: 'User chose option 2: Skip auto-discovery, provide fields manually.' Lines 38-43 show manual entry with user-provided values.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 19-20 of discovery-log.md state: 'Prompted user: "No Serena MCP servers were found. Would you like to continue without code intelligence or set up Serena first?"' and 'User chose to continue without code intelligence.'
